index.title: gongeo.us
index.subtitle: Infinity Nikki Resonance Tracker
index.description: Track your Infinity Nikki resonance history and statistics

import.choose_method_desc: Choose how you want to import your pull history.

import.game_import_desc: Import directly from the game using your browser.
import.login_pearpal_desc: Open Pearpal Website in a new tab and login with your Infold account if you aren't already logged in.
import.get_cookie: Get Cookie Data From Pearpal Website
import.get_cookie_desc: Choose how you want to get your cookie data:

console_steps.title: Follow these steps to get your cookie data:
console_steps.step1: Make sure you are logged in and is on Pearpal Website
console_steps.step2: Open your browser's Developer Tools (Press F12 or right-click and select "Inspect")
console_steps.step4: Copy and paste the following code into the console:
console_steps.step5: If you get a warning saying "Warning: Don't paste code into the devtools console", type "Allow pasting" and hit enter or switch to manual input method if you prefer
console_steps.step6: Copy the output text (it should look like the example in the input area below)
console_steps.step7: Come back to gongeo.us, paste the output text in the input area below

manual_steps.title: Follow these steps to manually input your cookie data:
manual_steps.note: (Using Google Chrome as an example, exact names might vary for other browsers but steps will be similar)
manual_steps.step1: Open your browser's Developer Tools (Press F12 or right-click and select "Inspect")
manual_steps.step3: In the left sidebar, expand "Cookies" and select the Pearpal website
manual_steps.step4: Alternatively, you can use a browser extension for cookies like Cookie Editor
manual_steps.step5: Find and copy the values for:
manual_steps.step6: For UID, go to your Pearpal profile and copy your UID number

import.security_note: Note: Never share these cookie values with anyone else!

data_source.question: How are you getting the data?
data_source.answer: We are using the same API as the in-game pull history page to access Infold Games servers that store the banner pull data. To access the data, we need to authenticate with the Infold Games server using your account cookies.

ban_risk.question: Will I get banned for using this?
ban_risk.answer: This is a third-party tool, so there is always some risk, though it is ultimately up to Infold Games. However, similar tools are widely used in other gacha games (Paimon.moe, Starrailstation, wuwatracker etc.) and also in the Chinese community of Infinity Nikki (小黑盒 游创工坊). Take this information as a reference, and make your own judgement.

data_storage.question: What data are you storing?
data_storage.answer: Your pull history is stored locally in your browser, so the next time you visit the site, it will be there unless you clear your browser data. We do not collect any personal information, including the cookies you submitted.

server_data.question: What data is sent to the server?
server_data.answer: Only your pull statistics are sent to help calculate global stats if you opt in. This includes a hashed version of your UID, and the information of 4* and 5* items you pulled.

platform_support.question: Will it work if I play on mobile or PS5?
platform_support.answer: Yes, it does not matter which platform you play on, as long as you log into the Pearpal website on PC using the same account. If you want to do the import on mobile, you will need a browser extension to access cookies, since Developer Tools are not available on mobile, I am able to import using Firefox on Android but the process is not user-friendly thus not recommended.

cookie_script.question: Do I need to run a script to get my cookies?
cookie_script.answer: No, you can get them manually. Open Dev Tools, go to Application > Cookies > https://pearpal.infoldgames.com/, and look for the cookie names you need. Check manual input instructions in the import page for more details.

no_pulls.question: All banners were processed, but no pulls are showing?
no_pulls.answer: Please check that your region and cookie values are correct. Make sure the UID and ID from the cookies are not mixed up.

permanent_banner.question: Why is the permanent banner Distant Sea not showing?
permanent_banner.answer: Pull data for permanent banners Distant Sea is available in game, it also take longer time and many more requests to process due to the large amount of pulls. It is not included currently on purpose.

auto_update.question: Will the data auto update?
auto_update.answer: No, you will need to redo the import process for new banners only if you keep your data in browser or local storage. The website will also need to update to support data for new banners. Additionally, for security reasons, the cookie will likely expire after some time.

export.question: How can I export my pull history?
export.answer: You can export your pull history as a PNG image or a JSON file. If your browser data is cleared, you can use the JSON file to restore your history.
